## Summary / 变更摘要

## Verification / 验证方式

- [ ] `gofmt` has been run / 已运行 `gofmt`
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes / 测试已通过
- [ ] Full and compact modes were checked when relevant / 已按需检查完整与精简模式
- [ ] Chinese and English content remain in sync / 中英文内容保持同步
- [ ] User-facing changes are documented / 用户可见变更已更新文档
